# EXPOZOR

> EXPOZOR is a personal expense tracking and organization tool for individuals and households.

EXPOZOR helps individuals and households track expenses manually, scan receipts, import CSV files, categorize transactions with AI assistance, and manage budgets across multiple currencies.

**EXPOZOR is not a bank, financial institution, or money transmitter. It does not connect to bank accounts, collect bank credentials, move money, or provide financial advice.**

## Key features

- Receipt scanning with OCR (upload image or screenshot)
- Manual transaction entry
- CSV import from any bank's own export
- AI-assisted categorization (rules-first, AI as fallback with confidence scores)
- Budget tracking with zero-based and envelope templates
- Shared household expense tracking (manual)
- Multi-currency support
- Spending reports and category insights

## Pricing (TODO: confirm before launch — billing not yet live)

- Free: limited expense entries per month, basic categorization, CSV export
- Plus: unlimited entries, receipt scanning, AI categorization, budget tracking, multi-currency
- Pro: everything in Plus + AI chat agent, custom rules, anomaly detection, API access
- Households: everything in Pro + up to 6 members, shared expense tracking
